name: CometChat
description: CometChat — In-app chat and calling SDK with UI kits for building messaging features in web and mobile apps.

seo.title: CometChat — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: CometChat: CometChat — In-app chat and calling SDK with UI kits for building messaging features in web and mobile apps.

when_to_use: In-app chat SDK for marketplace buyer-seller messaging
Live customer support widget with video calling
Real-time team collaboration feature for SaaS product
Healthcare telemedicine chat with HIPAA controls
Gaming social layer with group chat and reactions

pros: Drop-in UI kits speed up chat MVPs drastically
Covers chat, voice, video and push in one SDK
Moderation and AI features reduce custom work
Clear per-MAU pricing with generous free tier
cons: MAU pricing spikes fast once apps grow
UI kits hard to deeply customize past theming
Performance can lag in very large group chats
Vendor lock-in — hosted backend, not self-host
review.verdict: Fastest way to ship in-app chat — solid UI kits, but budget carefully as MAU scales.
review.best_for: Startups embedding chat, calls and video into web or mobile apps quickly
review.not_for: High-scale social apps or teams needing self-hosted, fully custom chat
